name: Client Proxy
description: Allows users to use Kirka's Built-in Proxies ;3
features: Persistent proxy selection saved across sessions

name: News System
description: Displays customizable news cards with categories and rich media
features: General, promotional, event, alert, giveaway categories
Fetches news data from remote repository

name: Discord Rich Presence
description: Shows what you're doing in Kirka as your Discord status
features: Shows current page/menu (lobby, leaderboard, market, servers, etc.)
Master toggle to disable/enable all RPC
Profile image support for Discord presence

name: Performance Enhancements
description: Optimize your gaming experience with performance tweaks
features: Unlimited FPS - Remove the 60fps cap for smoother gameplay
In-Process GPU - Run GPU in the same process for better performance

name: Activity Tracker
description: Track your kill statistics and weapon usage in real-time

name: Custom Keybinds
description: Customize keybinds for menu toggling and quick messages
features: Directional keybinds (Up, Down, Left, Right) for quick chat messages
Custom messages for each direction key
Supports modifier keys (Shift, Ctrl, Alt, Win)
Default: Right Shift for menu, Arrow keys for messages

name: Streamer Mode
description: Hide sensitive information while streaming or recording
features: Hide all usernames and short IDs

name: Account Management
description: Manage multiple Kirka accounts seamlessly
features: Switch between accounts with one click
View account name, tag, and level

name: Badge & Gradient System
description: Display custom badges and gradients for players
features: Support for multiple badge sources (Smudgy, Dawn, Redline, Custom)
Custom API support for user-created badge lists
Gradient name styling with rotation and color stops
Badge images with linked and booster badges
Automatic badge application to player names
Multiple badge display in order of priority
Automatic cache clearing on settings change

name: KTiers Integration
description: Display KTiers rankings and badges for players
features: Shows KTiers rank badge next to player names

name: Auto Token Capture
description: Automatically captures and saves your Kirka JWT token

name: Client Features Browser
description: Browse and search all available client features

name: Tools & Resources
description: Access useful tools and resources for Kirka

name: Other Clients
description: Discover other Kirka clients from the community
features: Dynamic client list from remote repository

name: Gun Tracker
description: Tracks kills and weapon usage for the active player

name: Profile Avatars
description: Display profile avatars for accounts and players
features: Fetches profile images from Smudgy API
Displays avatars in user pill and account list
Fallback to default user icon on error

name: End Game Message
description: Automatically sends a message when the game timer hits 0:01

name: Directional Quick Chat
description: Send predefined messages using direction keys
features: Custom messages for Up, Down, Left, Right keys
Default messages: Up, Down, Left, Right

name: Fake Banned Mode
description: Makes it look like you are banned from the game

name: Trade Logs
description: View and track your trade history

name: FAQ System
description: Frequently asked questions about the client

name: Credits System
description: Recognize the developers and contributors

name: Settings Persistence
description: All client settings are saved and restored across sessions

name: In-Game Menu System
description: Custom overlay menu accessible in-game

name: Search System
description: Global search across features, tools, and clients
